{
  "claim_texts": [
    "Legislation aims to address gaps in menopause education for healthcare providers.",
    "Approximately 51% of the population experiences menopause.",
    "Only 20.8% of medical residents felt their program had formal menopause education.",
    "A lack of training in menopause often leads to misdiagnoses of symptoms.",
    "Menopausal symptoms are sometimes mistaken for depression or chronic fatigue syndrome.",
    "AB 360 requires an assessment of physicians' training on menopause.",
